name: Pre-Roll Videos Enhanced
description: Play pre-roll videos before movies and TV shows on ALL clients with intelligent metadata-based selection.
overview: Enhanced pre-roll plugin combining universal client support with rich metadata selection rules

versions.changelog:
Initial release:
- Universal client support via session interception
- Works on Movies, TV Shows, and Episodes
- Metadata selection rules (Name, Year, Decade, Genre, Studios)
- Seasonal tag system for time-based pre-rolls
- Rating enforcement
- Loop prevention
- Compatible with Jellyfin 10.11+
